name: baseline
description: Default vLLM settings — no modifications. Establishes the performance baseline.

name: max_seqs_8
description: Reduce max-num-seqs to 8. Limits concurrency to reduce queuing under low traffic.

name: max_seqs_32
description: Increase max-num-seqs to 32. Higher throughput under heavy concurrency at cost of latency.

name: gpu_mem_70
description: Lower gpu-memory-utilization to 0.70. Leaves headroom for model activations.

name: gpu_mem_95
description: Push gpu-memory-utilization to 0.95. Maximizes KV cache blocks at risk of OOM.

name: chunked_prefill_on
description: Enable chunked prefill. Splits long prompts to reduce TTFT jitter under concurrency.

name: prefix_caching
description: Enable automatic prefix caching. Benefits workloads with shared prompt prefixes.

name: chunked_prefill_plus_prefix_cache
description: Combined: chunked prefill + prefix caching. Expected best latency for long prompts with concurrency.
